quotes: Email body width: **600px** fixed, centered
Mobile breakpoint: **480px**; all multi-column layouts collapse to single column
image/text split (≈40/60)
### Email Canvas & Grid
Email body width: **600px** fixed, centered
Mobile breakpoint: **480px**
practical layouts are 1-col, 2-col (50/50), or image/text split (≈40/60)

rules.intent: Guarantee consistent canvas and responsive collapse for seamless section assembly.
rules.rule_text: Email body is a fixed, centered 600px canvas (size.canvas.email_body_width = 600px); sections render edge-to-edge at exactly 600px so assembled sections butt cleanly. At the mobile breakpoint (breakpoint.email.mobile = 480px) all multi-column layouts collapse to single column. Internal grid uses a 12-column mental model; practical layouts are 1-col, 2-col (50/50), or image/text split (ratio.grid.image_text ≈ 40/60).

quotes: **Section side padding: 24px** left/right (consistent across ALL sections
**Vertical rhythm: 8px base unit.** All padding/margins are multiples of 8
Section top/bottom internal padding: **32px**
Heading → body gap: 16px. Paragraph → paragraph: 16px. Body → callout/CTA: 24px. Image → caption: 8px.
**Section side padding: 24px** left/right
**Vertical rhythm: 8px base unit.**
Section top/bottom internal padding: **32px**
Heading → body gap: 16px. Paragraph → paragraph: 16px. Body → callout/CTA: 24px. Image → caption: 8px.

rules.intent: Enforce the 8px rhythm and zero-gap section stacking for seamless assembly.
rules.rule_text: All sections use 24px left/right side padding (section.padding.sides = 24px), consistent across ALL sections so assembly is seamless; full-bleed imagery/gradient backgrounds may run to 600px but text within still respects the 24px insets. Vertical rhythm is built on an 8px base unit (spacing.base.unit = 8px) — all padding/margins are multiples of 8. Each section owns its own top AND bottom internal padding of 32px (section.padding.top_bottom = 32px) with no external margins between sections (zero-gap stacking). Gaps: heading→body 16px, paragraph→paragraph 16px, body→callout/CTA 24px (spacing.gap.body_callout = 24px), image→caption 8px.

quotes: Brand Blue #00529b background, White #ffffff text, Nunito Sans Bold 16px, padding 14px 32px, **min touch target 48px height**
corner radius 24px (fully rounded pill
Secondary CTA: White background, 2px Brand Blue border, Brand Blue text, same metrics

Brand Blue #00529b background, White #ffffff text, Nunito Sans Bold 16px, padding 14px 32px, **min touch target 48px height** (brand accessibility rule: ≥48px clickable areas), corner radius 24px (fully rounded pill
One primary CTA per section maximum.

rules.intent: Preserve approved CTA styling and the ≥48px accessibility touch-target.
rules.rule_text: Primary CTA buttons use a Brand Blue fill (#00529b) with White label text (#ffffff), Nunito Sans Bold at 16px, padding 14px 32px (padding.button.general_14_32), a minimum 48px clickable touch-target height (brand accessibility rule ≥48px), and a fully rounded 24px pill corner radius (radius.button.pill_24). Secondary CTA inverts this: White background with a 2px Brand Blue border (border.cta.secondary_2px_brand_blue) and Brand Blue text, same metrics. Maximum one primary CTA per section.

quotes: One primary CTA per section maximum.
One primary CTA per section maximum.

rules.intent: Prevent competing calls to action within a single section.
rules.rule_text: At most one primary CTA is allowed per section.
